params.token: The ERC-20 token address to support.
The ERC-20 token address to query.

returns._0: True if the protocol is active and not paused.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

params.token: The ERC-20 token address to remove.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.feeBps: The new fee percentage in basis points.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

addSupportedPaymentToken(address).notice: Adds a token to the supported payment token list.

isPaymentTokenSupported(address).notice: Returns whether the provided token is supported.

isProtocolOperational().notice: Returns whether the protocol is operational.

removeSupportedPaymentToken(address).notice: Removes a token from the supported payment token list.

setMarketplaceFee(uint256).notice: Updates the marketplace fee in basis points.
